StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(mc.note) AS production_note, MIN(t.title) AS movie_title, MIN(t.production_year) AS movie_year FROM job.company_type AS ct, job.info_type AS it, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_info_idx AS mi_idx, job.title AS t WHERE ct.kind = 'production companies' AND it.info = 'bottom 10 rank' AND mc.note NOT LIKE '%(as Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures)%' AND t.production_year >2000 AND ct.id = mc.company_type_id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND t.id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND it.id = mi_idx.info_type_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: NOT [dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] like '%(as Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures)%' AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1142],[dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[movie_id] as [mc].[movie_id]) AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1131],[dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[company_type_id] as [mc].[company_type_id])
